caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, large black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I DON'T DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room decorated with framed photos and a mannequin wearing a white shirt and green pants. A professional black microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. On the screen, logos for "SAY IT" and "RED SKY TOT" are visible in the lower corners. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, shifting his gaze and facial expressions. In the final frame, he closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly. The background remains static, showing various clothing items on a rack and a black office chair, while the man remains centered in the shot, interacting with someone off-screen.
